_comment: Pip's committed review verdicts. Preloaded by build.py into style_review.html so notes persist in git across sessions/machines. localStorage (live edits) overrides these. Update from Pip's Export paste, then rebuild.
styledir: Winning direction: warm-grime base + heavy-outline heft + deeper shadow, view-locked (symmetrical/straight-on/centered) to fix rotation. Monitors are the weak subject (composition); keep screens clearly powered/glowing.

notes.2026-07-16-style-matrix:baseline__desk: This is probably my favourite desk but suffers from being a little rotated in the image. I like the clutter and objects.
notes.2026-07-16-style-matrix:baseline__monito: This is one of the weakest monitors, coming across as dull and unpowered. Overall flavour is fine.
notes.2026-07-16-style-matrix:baseline__charac: This is a good character, good colour identity, professional attire.
notes.2026-07-16-style-matrix:futurepunk__desk: This is a little too bright and shiny overall, the potted plant and wastepaper bin are nice touches.
notes.2026-07-16-style-matrix:heavy-outline__d: This has a satisfying heft to it that I like, the objects have a good amount of visual distinction from each other.
notes.2026-07-16-style-matrix:warm-grime__desk: The clutter and coziness of this desk, combined with the object on the PC tower, are all excellent.
notes.2026-07-16-style-matrix:warm-grime__moni: Good monitor, something weird going on where it looks like the monitor has a CD player coming out of it, but acceptable as a first-pass.
notes.2026-07-16-style-matrix:warm-grime__char: The glasses render pretty weirdly on this model, otherwise good.
notes.2026-07-16-style-matrix:moody-contrast__: The angling of this composition is weird and it has a chair which highlights shadows, but wouldn't work as a single asset. I like the increased shadows and moodiness.
I like the expression and tone on this character, a little bit cynical, but more individualistic. Overall I like the shadows and mood tuning.
notes.2026-07-16-office-library:chair: Looks a little small compared to the others; otherwise OK. Perhaps a little too modern for a starting chair. [RE-ROLLING: older/cheaper starting chair, larger]
notes.2026-07-16-office-library:bookshelf: Looks more like a home than an office bookshelf; don't want much wood -- make it laminate / more office-shelfy. [RE-ROLLING]
notes.2026-07-16-office-library:water_cooler: Extremely good. Might be slightly too angled / perspective in wrong direction.
notes.2026-07-16-office-library:server_rack: Extremely excellent. Direction and lighting might be slightly wrong, possibly wrong direction. Unclear.
notes.2026-07-16-office-library:coat_rack: Excellent. Shoes might be a bit neater, slightly less domestic; office coatrack should be a bit neater.
notes.sweep:props:desk_mega:1: good, unsure if shadow under desk hurts transparency; likes detail/texture; undecided on game-responsive monitors (later UI update)
notes.sweep:props:pc_mega:4: keep as default so we can move on
notes.sweep:props:meeting_table:3: dramatic lighting is great, want more samples of it
notes.sweep:environment:window_weather_clear:1: lighting direction maybe weird, good asset
notes.sweep:environment:window_weather_doomy:3: not good but use as default for testing while we iterate
notes.sweep:characters_use_create_character:ba: best of an OK bunch, rest feel a little under
notes.sweep:characters_use_create_character:fo: all bad but tolerate for testing. Wrong orientation. Should mostly see chair and silhouette; chair is the visual focus
notes.sweep:cosmetics_overlays:lanyard_badge:3: feels advanced/doomy, maybe keep/recycle for that
notes.sweep:cosmetics_overlays:headphones:3: like all of these, want variants on characters if that works
notes.sweep:cosmetics_overlays:headphones:1: like all of these, want variants on characters if that works
notes.sweep:cosmetics_overlays:headphones:2: like all of these, want variants on characters if that works
notes.reroll:cats:cat_purple:3: eyes good, maybe too bright, agree and move on
notes.reroll:cats:cat_purple:4: excellent pose, ears weird; experiment keeping cat same base colour and changing effects around it with doom colouring instead; colour range good for effects but maybe not the cat itself
notes.reroll:characters:cast_eccentric_genius:: would love a female version, might scan better as a woman, otherwise same
notes.reroll:founder:founder:1: great, also want one facing the other way, maybe 3/4 like reference sheets
notes.reroll:objects:filing_cabinet:2: if we keep a scummy version, like this
notes.reroll:objects:server_cluster_mega:4: maybe rotate 90deg or check lighting (server-rack lighting rules could differ)
